## Example QuestionnaireResponse: Example: Risk Input Questionnaire Response (score 11)

Perfil: [HEARTLAND Questionnaire Response](StructureDefinition-heartland-questionnaire-response.md)

* [ID da ligação](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): QuestionnaireResponseExampleRiskInputs
  * [Texto](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definição](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Resposta](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Questionário:[HEARTLAND Risk Input Questionnaire](Questionnaire-heartland-risk-input-questionnaire.md)
* [ID da ligação](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)age-75
  * [Texto](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): Age >=75 years
  * [Definição](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Resposta](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): true
* [ID da ligação](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)hf-hosp-6mo
  * [Texto](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): Prior heart failure hospitalization within 6 months
  * [Definição](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Resposta](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): true
* [ID da ligação](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)egfr-low
  * [Texto](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): eGFR <45 mL/min/1.73m^2
  * [Definição](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Resposta](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): false
* [ID da ligação](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)natriuretic-high
  * [Texto](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): BNP >=500 pg/mL or NT-proBNP >=1500 pg/mL
  * [Definição](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Resposta](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): false
* [ID da ligação](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)sbp-low
  * [Texto](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): Systolic BP <100 mmHg at admission
  * [Definição](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Resposta](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): true
* [ID da ligação](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)diabetes
  * [Texto](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): Diabetes mellitus
  * [Definição](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Resposta](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): false
* [ID da ligação](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)lvef-low
  * [Texto](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): LVEF <30%
  * [Definição](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Resposta](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): false
* [ID da ligação](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)ckm-stage
  * [Texto](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): Cardiovascular-kidney-metabolic (CKM) Stage 3 or 4
  * [Definição](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Resposta](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): true
* [ID da ligação](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)distance-far
  * [Texto](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): Distance to cardiology care >50 miles
  * [Definição](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Resposta](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): true
* [ID da ligação](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)social-support
  * [Texto](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): Lives alone or limited social support
  * [Definição](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Resposta](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): true
* [ID da ligação](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentação para este formato

      "valueBoolean" : true
    }]
  },

    "linkId" : "egfr-low",
    "text" : "eGFR <45 mL/min/1.73m^2",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueBoolean" : false
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "natriuretic-high",

    "answer" : [{
      "valueBoolean" : false
    }]
  },

    "linkId" : "sbp-low",
    "text" : "Systolic BP <100 mmHg at admission",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueBoolean" : true
    }]
  },

    "answer" : [{

  },

    "linkId" : "lvef-low",

    "answer" : [{

  },

    "answer" : [{

    "linkId" : "distance-far",
    "text" : "Distance to cardiology care >50 miles",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueBoolean" : true
